_comment: Test fixture for the scenario suite (S5 raw footage). An AUTHORED chapter list, i.e. what a human or the model would produce after watching the footage. Input to tools/videoedit/chapters.py fan_out/validate. No product tool derives this list from the transcript (gap G9); the suite tests the fan-out plumbing that exists.

chapters.title: Bench build and the tool wall
Final reveal and what is next
